code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about a sports team (or related entities) into a readable sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Mapping of predicates to natural‑language templates
    # Helper to clean quoted literals
    def _clean(o: str) -> str:
        return o[1:-1] if (len(o) >= 2 and o[0] == '"' and o[-1] == '"') else o

    templates = {
        "numberOfMembers": lambda s, o: f"{s} has {_clean(o)} members",
        "season": lambda s, o: f"{s} played in the {_clean(o)} season",
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} competes in the {_clean(o)} league",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{s} is managed by {_clean(o)}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays at {_clean(o)}",
        "fullName": lambda s, o: f"The full name of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f"The chairman of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "location": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {_clean(o)}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"The owner of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "nickname": lambda s, o: f"{s} is nicknamed {_clean(o)}",
        "chairmanTitle": lambda s, o: f"The {_clean(o)} of {s} is {_clean(o)}",  # e.g., President
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {_clean(o)}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"The leader of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "part": lambda s, o: f"{s} includes {_clean(o)}",
        "mayor": lambda s, o: f"The mayor of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "champions": lambda s, o: f"The champions of {s} are {_clean(o)}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in {_clean(o)}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {_clean(o)}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"The capital of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"The demonym for {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"The language of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "leaderParty": lambda s, o: f"The leader party of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {_clean(o)}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {_clean(o)}",
        "youthclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} was in youth club {_clean(o)}",
        "operator": lambda s, o: f"{s} is operated by {_clean(o)}",
        "tenant": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a tenant of {_clean(o)}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the city of {_clean(o)}",
        "state": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the state of {_clean(o)}",
    }

    phrases = []
    for t in triples:
        formatter = templates.get(t.predicate)
        if formatter:
            phrases.append(formatter(t.subject, t.object))
        else:
            # Fallback for unexpected predicates
            phrases.append(f"{t.subject} {t.predicate} {t.object}")

    # Join all parts into a single fluent sentence using proper conjunctions
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        sentence = phrases[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."
    # Capitalize first character
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
